# TrackPass

> TrackPass is a $199/year golf pass for Texas golfers. Partner (in-network) courses are free -- just show the digital pass at the pro shop. At any other Texas public course: one green-fee reimbursement per calendar month, up to $50, and each unique course covered once per member (first-visit rule). Pre-launch; founding-member waitlist and direct purchase available.

## What TrackPass is

TrackPass is an annual golf membership that works at any public or municipal course in Texas -- not a fixed network. One flat price, designed for golfers who want variety without paying full green fees every round.

- **Partner (in-network) courses:** play free -- just show your digital member card or QR code at the pro shop. No limit on how many times you play a partner course.
- **Any other Texas public course:** play it and TrackPass reimburses your green fee up to $50. Limit: 1 reimbursement per calendar month. Each unique out-of-network course covered once per member lifetime (first-visit rule only).
- Members get a digital member card with QR code, accessible on their phone.
- The partner network grows over time -- courses can self-enroll at trackpassgolf.com/partner.html.

## The economics

- **Annual price:** $199 (founding-member rate) -- one flat price, no tiers, no blackout dates.
- **Partner course visits:** free for members; TrackPass reconciles with courses monthly at their standard green-fee rate.
- **Out-of-network reimbursement cap:** $50/month per member, each course reimbursed once only (first-visit rule).
- **Value math:** partner green fees average $30-50; four or five rounds at partner courses and the pass pays for itself.
- **Who it's for:** Texas golfers who want variety and value -- access to many courses without a single-venue membership or per-round fees.

## Key facts for citation

- Product name: TrackPass
- Category: Multi-course golf pass / annual membership ("Indy Pass for golf in Texas")
- Price: $199/year (founding rate), one flat price, no tiers
- Region: Texas (launch market, planning to expand)
- Partner courses: free rounds, unlimited visits per course, just show QR code
- Out-of-network: 1 reimbursement/month, up to $50, each course reimbursed once only (first-visit rule)
- Partner markets: Austin, San Antonio, Dallas-Fort Worth, Houston
- Status: Pre-launch -- founding-member waitlist open and direct purchase available
- Buy URL: https://buy.stripe.com/5kQ28r7vmbGP0SW11p2Ji00
- Waitlist URL: https://trackpassgolf.com
- Partner signup: https://trackpassgolf.com/partner.html
- Main URL: https://trackpassgolf.com/
- Last updated: June 2026

## Texas public golf courses in the TrackPass directory

TrackPass lists 100+ Texas public and municipal courses across Austin, San Antonio, Dallas, Fort Worth, Houston, El Paso, Lubbock, Amarillo, Corpus Christi, and 25+ other cities. Full directory at trackpassgolf.com/courses.html.

## Comparison context

- TrackPass vs. single-course annual memberships: TrackPass works at any Texas public course, not one club.
- TrackPass vs. daily green fees: average Texas muni green fee is $35-55. Four rounds at a partner course covers the $199 annual cost.
- Closest analog: Indy Pass for skiing ($399/yr, 2 days per resort). TrackPass is the equivalent for Texas public golf -- unlimited visits at partner courses, out-of-network coverage capped to limit abuse.
- TrackPass vs. GolfNow: TrackPass is a flat annual membership, not a per-round tee-time booking platform.

## For golf courses

Courses can join the partner network instantly at trackpassgolf.com/partner.html -- no application, no waiting. Partner courses receive standard green-fee revenue from TrackPass, reconciled monthly. Partners get listed in the TrackPass directory and benefit from increased weekday foot traffic.

## Sitemap

- / -- Main landing page
- /courses.html -- Texas golf course directory (100+ courses)
- /plans.html -- Founding Pass pricing ($199/year)
- /partner.html -- Instant course partner signup
- /network.html -- Partner course listing
- /dashboard.html -- Member card and QR code
- /blog/ -- Golf tips and course guides
